name: Kiera Kilgore
ai_summary: Kiera Kilgore from Georgia has lifelong childcare experience from babysitting and church roles with newborns to toddlers. She is available full-time or part-time and handles conflicts by separating children and calming them with kindness.

transcripts.q3:
Hi. My name is Ciara in my experience with childcare is that I babysit children, basically, my whole life by babysitting children, when I was younger to watching my own siblings. And as I got older, I worked in my church and the children's area watching over newborns and toddlers from their ages of two to six.
 Or even older just depending on what class I was stationed at and I enjoy working with children because it feels natural to me and I've worked with in my whole life. So it's just, I just love to be around them, you know?
transcripts.q4:
Location. Georgia, my city is Milner and I'm located in the United States.
 And I'm willing to travel no more than an hour away.
 A few miles even.
transcripts.q5:
I can either work part-time and full-time, it doesn't matter, my schedule can be depending on anything. I could work. Weekend's weekdays holidays overnight.
 It doesn't really matter.
transcripts.q6:
If there was conflict between two children, the first thing I do is separate them to avoid any more confrontation. Then, the second thing I do is calm them both down and let them know, you know, kindness is key.
 And it benefits more to be kind.
 And that.
 Dealing with the situation more calmly with a more calm tone.
 And understanding.
transcripts.q7:
I will make a great up kid teacher because I'm experienced I am calm.
 I know how to handle situations, radically.
 And it feels natural to me to take care of children. So I think I love this opportunity to be able to work with them.
